'''Francill Trell''' was the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of [[Vimran Trell]]. It was he who taught his son to cook. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] invaded their homeworld, [[Yutusk]], Francill and his wife, [[Tranira Trell|Tranira]], were executed as suspected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sympathizers. Their deaths ensured that Vimran used his position as chef on the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Adjudicator'']] to secretly pass information to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
